Home/Services/Dental Implants
Dental Implants

Dental Implants in Kolkata | Permanent Tooth Replacement

Dental implants are the gold standard for replacing missing teeth, and Sushmita's Dental Clinic offers this life-changing treatment at our Salt Lake City (Bidhannagar) clinic. A dental implant is a titanium post placed into the jawbone, acting as a new tooth root.

Unlike dentures or bridges, dental implants are a permanent solution that looks, feels, and functions exactly like natural teeth. They help preserve jawbone, prevent neighbouring teeth from shifting, and restore full chewing ability and confidence.

Our experienced implantologist has helped hundreds of patients across Kolkata regain their smile. We serve patients from New Town, Rajarhat, Jadavpur, Howrah, Dum Dum, and all parts of the Kolkata Metropolitan Area.

Key Benefits

  • Permanent solution lasting 15-25+ years
  • Looks and feels completely natural
  • Restores full chewing function
  • Prevents jawbone deterioration
  • No impact on adjacent healthy teeth
  • Improves confidence and speech

Our Treatment Process

1

Consultation & X-Ray Assessment

Digital OPG X-ray to assess bone density and implant suitability.

2

Treatment Planning

Customised implant plan with cost estimate and timeline.

3

Implant Placement

Titanium post placed under local anaesthesia — virtually painless.

4

Healing Period

3-6 months for osseointegration (implant fusing with bone).

5

Crown Fitting

Custom porcelain crown fitted for a perfect natural appearance.

Book Appointment

We confirm within 2 hours • Free first consultation

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Are dental implants painful?

The procedure is under local anaesthesia and virtually painless. Post-procedure discomfort is minimal.

How long do implants last?

With proper care, dental implants can last a lifetime. The crown typically lasts 15-20 years.

How much do implants cost in Kolkata?

Significantly lower than in Western countries. Book a consultation for a personalised quote.

Am I suitable for dental implants?

Most adults with good general health are suitable. A consultation and X-ray will confirm eligibility.
